jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Adda247
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adda247:
Adda247 is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247!
